scripts.generate:incap-informe: node --input-type=module -e "import XLSX from 'xlsx'; import fs from 'fs'; const wb=XLSX.readFile('2. Incapacidades_2026.xlsx'); const out={}; for (const y of ['2023','2024','2025','2026']) out[y]=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets['FT-GEI-SO-016 Informe '+y],{header:1,defval:''}); fs.writeFileSync('./src/incapInformeData.json', JSON.stringify(out)); console.log('incapInformeData.json updated');"
